name: Nebraska Certified Nursing Assistant Certification
description: Already certified as a CNA? Here's whether your certification transfers to Nebraska - endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.

address.description:
Nebraska Department of Health and Human Services
Licensure Unit – Nurse Aide Registry
P.O. Box 94986
Lincoln, NE 68509-4986

requiredDocuments.name: Proof of Training
requiredDocuments.description: Certificate of completion from your approved CNA training program.

requiredDocuments.name: State Competency Exam Results
requiredDocuments.description: Official verification of passing your state's nurse aide competency evaluation.

fingerprinting.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan OR FD-258 hard card via mail

mainEntity.name: How much does Nebraska CNA endorsement cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: There is no application fee for CNA endorsement in Nebraska. However, background check fees may apply.
Yes, a fingerprint-based background check is required in Nebraska.

mainEntity.name: How long does it take to transfer my CNA certification to Nebraska?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most endorsement applications take 4 to 6 Weeks.

mainEntity.name: Can I start working in Nebraska while waiting?

acceptedAnswer.text: Check with the state board about temporary practice permits while your endorsement is being processed.
